rulings.Case Title: DAMIEN QUINN VS. BELLROSE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 11, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. As to the Seventh COA: Cross-claimant shall allege facts showing the formation and operation of a conspiracy among the alleged co-conspirators. Since fraud is alleged to be the object of the conspiracy, the claim must be pleaded with particularity and cross-claimant must allege facts showing "how, when, where, to whom, and by what means the misrepresentations were tendered. As to the Eighth COA: Cross-claimant must plead facts of ORTC's role in the alleged enterprise and the conduct involving the element of direction. As to the allegations of mail fraud, Cross-claimant must also detail with particularity the time, place, and manner of each act of fraud, plus the role of each defendant in each scheme. As to the allegations of extortion, Cross-claimant must plead facts showing ORTC or any other cross-defendant "obtained" property by actual or threatened force. As to the fourteenth COA: Cross-claimant should specifically plead the business practice and conduct that is alleged to be 'unfair' under Business & Professions Code section 17200 as it pertains to ORTC. = (501/CFH)
